visualization.description: Average number of credits grouped by course type.
visualization.title: Average Credits by Course Type

resultRaw.sql: SELECT course_type AS course_type, ROUND(AVG(credits), 2) AS avg_credits FROM courses GROUP BY course_type ORDER BY avg_credits DESC;

visualization.description: Average number of credits grouped by course type.
visualization.title: Average Credits by Course Type

result.sql: SELECT course_type AS course_type, ROUND(AVG(credits), 2) AS avg_credits FROM courses GROUP BY course_type ORDER BY avg_credits DESC;
